results.command: python3 -c "import franken_networkx as fnx; N=1200; D=5; P=3; G=fnx.MultiGraph(); G.add_nodes_from(range(N)); [G.add_edge(u,(u+off)%N,key=(off,k),weight=(u*17+((u+off)%N)*31+k)%97) for u in range(N) for off in range(1,D+1) for k in range(P)]; [fnx.to_dict_of_dicts(G) for _ in range(80)]"

python3 -c "import networkx as nx; N=1200; D=5; P=3; G=nx.MultiGraph(); G.add_nodes_from(range(N)); [G.add_edge(u,(u+off)%N,key=(off,k),weight=(u*17+((u+off)%N)*31+k)%97) for u in range(N) for off in range(1,D+1) for k in range(P)]; [nx.to_dict_of_dicts(G) for _ in range(80)]"
